<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"></script>

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<script id="tailwind-config">
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: "class",
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        "inverse-on-surface": "#565554",
                        "surface": "#0e0e0e",
                        "on-error-container": "#ffd2c8",
                        "secondary-dim": "#d6d4d3",
                        "tertiary-container": "#fce047",
                        "on-secondary-fixed-variant": "#5c5b5b",
                        "primary-container": "#cafd00",
                        "on-secondary": "#525151",
                        "inverse-primary": "#516700",
                        "on-primary-fixed-variant": "#526900",
                        "on-surface": "#ffffff",
                        "surface-container-highest": "#262626",
                        "primary-dim": "#beee00",
                        "surface-container-lowest": "#000000",
                        "on-surface-variant": "#adaaaa",
                        "tertiary-dim": "#edd13a",
                        "secondary-fixed-dim": "#d6d4d3",
                        "primary": "#f3ffca",
                        "surface-tint": "#f3ffca",
                        "outline-variant": "#494847",
                        "on-primary": "#516700",
                        "outline": "#777575",
                        "on-error": "#450900",
                        "secondary-fixed": "#e5e2e1",
                        "background": "#0e0e0e",
                        "secondary": "#e5e2e1",
                        "primary-fixed-dim": "#beee00",
                        "on-tertiary-container": "#5d5000",
                        "surface-bright": "#2c2c2c",
                        "on-primary-fixed": "#3a4a00",
                        "on-primary-container": "#4a5e00",
                        "tertiary-fixed-dim": "#edd13a",
                        "on-secondary-container": "#d2d0cf",
                        "surface-dim": "#0e0e0e",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed-variant": "#685900",
                        "primary-fixed": "#cafd00",
                        "on-background": "#ffffff",
                        "on-tertiary-fixed": "#483d00",
                        "surface-variant": "#262626",
                        "secondary-container": "#474746",
                        "tertiary": "#ffeea5",
                        "on-tertiary": "#665800",
                        "surface-container": "#1a1919",
                        "on-secondary-fixed": "#403f3f",
                        "error-container": "#b92902",
                        "error": "#ff7351",
                        "tertiary-fixed": "#fce047",
                        "error-dim": "#d53d18",
                        "surface-container-high": "#201f1f",
                        "inverse-surface": "#fcf8f8",
                        "surface-container-low": "#131313"
                    },
                    fontFamily: {
                        "headline": ["Space Grotesk"],
                        "body": ["Inter"],
                        "label": ["Inter"]
                    },
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "1rem", "lg": "2rem", "xl": "3rem", "full": "9999px"},
                },
            },
        }
    </script>
<style>
        .material-symbols-outlined { font-variation-settings: 'FILL' 0, 'wght' 400, 'GRAD' 0, 'opsz' 24; }
        .glass-panel { background: rgba(32, 31, 31, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1px solid rgba(73, 72, 71, 0.15); }
        .light-streak { background: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 45%, rgba(243, 255, 202, 0.05) 50%, transparent 55%); background-size: 200% 200%; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #0e0e0e; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #494847; border-radius: 10px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: #f3ffca; }
    </style>
